# STRAT.011 ? Blue Ocean Strategy

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** business_strategy
**Domain:** BUSINESS_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Create uncontested market space; make competition irrelevant; value innovation; four actions framework (eliminate/reduce/raise/create)

## Application
Find untapped markets; don't compete on existing terms; innovate value; eliminate/reduce/raise/create factors; make competition irrelevant

## Key Values
- Uncontested space
- Value innovation
- Competition irrelevance
- Market creation
- Strategic move

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, business_strategy

Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
